title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Bayer Biohealth UK Limited
body: "Application number 5029  Applicant Bayer Aktiengesellschaft objected to the name used by Bayer Biohealth UK Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal. "
